sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114327" key="xolai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χολ-αίνω</orth>, <sense id="n114327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χολάω</ref></xr>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:184" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">184</biblScope> </bibl> (ii <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:p.263" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.263</biblScope> </bibl> Chambry).</sense> </entryFree>
